name: Observation Haki
description: allows users to predict the immediate movements of opponents, and detect their presence at any time, even if they are hidden or too far away to be seen naturally.

name: Weaponry Haki
description: This form of Haki creates an invisible armor that is one of the few ways to touch people who have eaten a Demon Fruit and counter their attacks. It also enhances the power of weapons (arrows or swords) and blows. It would appear that a higher level of this fluid exists, in the form of a blackening of a part of the individual's body, or even a total blackening of the user's body combined with a significant increase in physical resistance.

name: Haki of Kings
description: This form of Haki is more or less powerful, depending on the will of the user, and cannot be strengthened by any means (other than experience and willpower). In fact, this Haki evolves according to the will of the person to be "conquered". If the person has a very strong spirit, this Haki will be devastating. If they don't, this Haki may well be less effective.
